speaker: speaker1
text: Can we choose a time to look at houses together ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Can you do that in the mornings , or would the afternoons be best ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Either way is good for me .

speaker: speaker2
text: There are a number of open houses this weekend in your area . Would that okay with you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I can take a little time off of work , or I can go on a weekend , also .

speaker: speaker2
text: We could meet at the real estate office , or I could pick you up at your home .

speaker: speaker1
text: I am leaving from work , so maybe I could just meet you at the first house that we will look at .

speaker: speaker2
text: I can think of five houses that we should look at . It will take most of the day .

speaker: speaker1
text: I would like to see as many as possible .

speaker: speaker2
text: When I have confirmed the times with the owners , I will e-mail you our plans for the day .
